chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 123 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1709/2021 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1710/2021 10.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahad, advocate for the applicant Detailed order was passed on 03.10.2025. Today, learned counsel remained unable to assist. This reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
